meaning: n.(鏈哄櫒绛夌殑)閬ユ帶(鎸囦护)
examples: Telecommand operation platform is empoldered for implementing telecommand operation mode by the space control center.
The rules to be obeyed in program realization are summed up in insuring the reliability of telecommand and teleadjusting.
With the method mentioned the entropy of telecommand messages will obviously be increased and the security of transmission enhanced as well.
